description: Google Cloud Pub/Sub is a managed asynchronous messaging service for publishing and consuming messages between applications and services. It provides topics, subscriptions, snapshots, and schemas for message distribution and replay.
summary: pubsub.googleapis.com exposes a Pub/Sub REST API at https://pubsub.googleapis.com/ authenticated by Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens or a Google Cloud API key, plus an MCP endpoint at https://pubsub.googleapis.com/mcp that seed facts indicate is unauthenticated.
